Dialog.name: MSG_STOP_GO_OUT_MITURU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}We cannot allow you to go out after dark.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_STOP_GO_OUT_YUKARI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't want you to overdo it... Why don't you call it a day?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_STOP_INTO_MYROOM
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was told to go to the fourth floor...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_NG_GoOut
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1007 0 0}Hey, where are you going!? It's not safe outside![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_NG2Fto1F_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1103 0 0}Wait, not that way! We need to go up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_NG3Fto2F_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1100 0 0}What are you doing!? We have to go up to get away![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2037 0 0}You shouldn't go out there, man! You're gonna catch a cold or something...[n]{f 1 1}
